text_replacements.description: Allow browser-wasm builds to download a prebuilt libfibercpu archive when the native source tree is omitted from the public export.
text_replacements.search:
<Target Name="BuildNativeLib" BeforeTargets="BeforeBuild" Condition="'$(DesignTimeBuild)' != 'true'">
        <Message Text="Building libfibercpu with CMake..." Importance="High"/>
        <PropertyGroup>
            <BuildFibercpuStatic Condition="'$(PublishAot)' == 'true' Or '$(PodishStaticNative)' == 'true' Or '$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true'">true</BuildFibercpuStatic>
            <BuildFibercpuStatic Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == ''">false</BuildFibercpuStatic>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == 'true'">-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DFIBERCPU_BUILD_STATIC=ON -DFIBERCPU_ENABLE_LTO=OFF</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == 'true' And $([System.String]::Copy('$(RuntimeIdentifier)').StartsWith('ios'))">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME=iOS -DCMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES=arm64</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == 'true' And $([System.String]::Copy('$(RuntimeIdentifier)').StartsWith('ios-'))">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT=iphoneos</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == 'true' And $([System.String]::Copy('$(RuntimeIdentifier)').StartsWith('iossimulator-'))">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT=iphonesimulator</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' != 'true'">-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DFIBERCPU_BUILD_STATIC=OFF</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="$([MSBuild]::IsOsPlatform('OSX')) And '$(IsBrowserWasm)' != 'true'">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=/usr/bin/cc -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=/usr/bin/c++</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeHandlerProfile Condition="'$(EnableHandlerProfile)' == 'true'">ON</CMakeHandlerProfile>
            <CMakeHandlerProfile Condition="'$(CMakeHandlerProfile)' == ''">OFF</CMakeHandlerProfile>
            <CMakeSuperOpcodes Condition="'$(EnableSuperOpcodes)' == 'false'">OFF</CMakeSuperOpcodes>
            <CMakeSuperOpcodes Condition="'$(CMakeSuperOpcodes)' == ''">ON</CMakeSuperOpcodes>
            <CMakeArgs>$(CMakeArgs) -DFIBERCPU_ENABLE_HANDLER_PROFILE=$(CMakeHandlerProfile)</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs>$(CMakeArgs) -DFIBERCPU_ENABLE_SUPEROPCODES=$(CMakeSuperOpcodes)</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeGeneratorArgs Condition="'$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true'">-G Ninja</CMakeGeneratorArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true'">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE="$(EmscriptenToolchainFile)" -DCMAKE_CROSSCOMPILING_EMULATOR="$(BrowserWasmNodeExecutable)"</CMakeArgs>
        </PropertyGroup>
        <Error Condition="'$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true' And '$(EmscriptenToolchainFile)' == ''"
               Text="browser-wasm build requires Emscripten. Set EmscriptenToolchainFile to your Emscripten.cmake path." />
        <Exec Command="cmake -S ../libfibercpu -B $(NativeBuildDir) $(CMakeGeneratorArgs) $(CMakeArgs)" WorkingDirectory="$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)"/>
        <Exec Command="cmake --build $(NativeBuildDir) --config Release" WorkingDirectory="$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)"/>
    </Target>
text_replacements.replace:
<Target Name="BuildNativeLib" BeforeTargets="BeforeBuild" Condition="'$(DesignTimeBuild)' != 'true'">
        <PropertyGroup>
            <LibFibercpuSourceDir>$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)../libfibercpu</LibFibercpuSourceDir>
            <LibFibercpuSourceExists Condition="Exists('$(LibFibercpuSourceDir)/CMakeLists.txt')">true</LibFibercpuSourceExists>
            <LibFibercpuSourceExists Condition="'$(LibFibercpuSourceExists)' == ''">false</LibFibercpuSourceExists>
        </PropertyGroup>

        <DownloadFile Condition="'$(LibFibercpuSourceExists)' != 'true' And '$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true' And !Exists('$(NativeBuildDir)/libfibercpu.a')"
                      SourceUrl="https://github.com/GiantNeko/fibercpu/releases/latest/download/libfibercpu-wasm.a"
                      DestinationFolder="$(NativeBuildDir)"
                      DestinationFileName="libfibercpu.a" />

        <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(LibFibercpuSourceExists)' == 'true'">
            <BuildFibercpuStatic Condition="'$(PublishAot)' == 'true' Or '$(PodishStaticNative)' == 'true' Or '$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true'">true</BuildFibercpuStatic>
            <BuildFibercpuStatic Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == ''">false</BuildFibercpuStatic>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == 'true'">-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DFIBERCPU_BUILD_STATIC=ON -DFIBERCPU_ENABLE_LTO=OFF</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == 'true' And $([System.String]::Copy('$(RuntimeIdentifier)').StartsWith('ios'))">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME=iOS -DCMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES=arm64</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == 'true' And $([System.String]::Copy('$(RuntimeIdentifier)').StartsWith('ios-'))">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT=iphoneos</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' == 'true' And $([System.String]::Copy('$(RuntimeIdentifier)').StartsWith('iossimulator-'))">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT=iphonesimulator</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(BuildFibercpuStatic)' != 'true'">-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DFIBERCPU_BUILD_STATIC=OFF</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="$([MSBuild]::IsOsPlatform('OSX')) And '$(IsBrowserWasm)' != 'true'">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=/usr/bin/cc -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=/usr/bin/c++</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeHandlerProfile Condition="'$(EnableHandlerProfile)' == 'true'">ON</CMakeHandlerProfile>
            <CMakeHandlerProfile Condition="'$(CMakeHandlerProfile)' == ''">OFF</CMakeHandlerProfile>
            <CMakeSuperOpcodes Condition="'$(EnableSuperOpcodes)' == 'false'">OFF</CMakeSuperOpcodes>
            <CMakeSuperOpcodes Condition="'$(CMakeSuperOpcodes)' == ''">ON</CMakeSuperOpcodes>
            <CMakeArgs>$(CMakeArgs) -DFIBERCPU_ENABLE_HANDLER_PROFILE=$(CMakeHandlerProfile)</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeArgs>$(CMakeArgs) -DFIBERCPU_ENABLE_SUPEROPCODES=$(CMakeSuperOpcodes)</CMakeArgs>
            <CMakeGeneratorArgs Condition="'$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true'">-G Ninja</CMakeGeneratorArgs>
            <CMakeArgs Condition="'$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true'">$(CMakeArgs) -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE="$(EmscriptenToolchainFile)" -DCMAKE_CROSSCOMPILING_EMULATOR="$(BrowserWasmNodeExecutable)"</CMakeArgs>
        </PropertyGroup>

        <Message Condition="'$(LibFibercpuSourceExists)' == 'true'" Text="Building libfibercpu with CMake..." Importance="High"/>
        <Error Condition="'$(LibFibercpuSourceExists)' == 'true' And '$(IsBrowserWasm)' == 'true' And '$(EmscriptenToolchainFile)' == ''"
               Text="browser-wasm build requires Emscripten. Set EmscriptenToolchainFile to your Emscripten.cmake path." />
        <Exec Condition="'$(LibFibercpuSourceExists)' == 'true'" Command="cmake -S ../libfibercpu -B $(NativeBuildDir) $(CMakeGeneratorArgs) $(CMakeArgs)" WorkingDirectory="$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)"/>
        <Exec Condition="'$(LibFibercpuSourceExists)' == 'true'" Command="cmake --build $(NativeBuildDir) --config Release" WorkingDirectory="$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)"/>
    </Target>
